image.description: OCI container image to run steps in (e.g. "node:22-alpine"). Mutually exclusive with 'dependencies'.

dependencies.description: Nix flake sources mapped to the attribute names to install. Keys are flake references: "nixpkgs", "nixpkgs/<channel>", "github:owner/repo", "gitlab:owner/repo", "git+https://...", "git+ssh://...", "https://...", or "tarball+https://...". Mutually exclusive with 'image'.

cpus.description: Number of virtual CPUs. Minimum 1, default 2.

network.description: Network egress controls for the VM.

allowed_hosts.description: Additional hostnames or IPs allowed for outbound TCP connections (ports 80/443). Common infrastructure hosts are always allowed.

cache.description: Cache configuration for persisting tool artifacts across VM runs.

paths.description: Additional guest paths to cache. Absolute paths are used as-is; relative paths resolve under the workspace (/home/kvarn/workspace); paths starting with ~ expand to the kvarn user's home (/home/kvarn). Caching the workspace root itself or anything under /nix is rejected. Tool cache paths (e.g. Go modules, npm cache) are included automatically.

entries.description: Keyed cache entries for fine-grained cache control. Each entry may use lockfiles for content-addressed keying, a fixed key, or a bucket name.

environment.description: Environment variables injected into every step inside the VM. Keys must be valid POSIX env-var names (letters, digits, underscore; must not start with a digit).

secrets.description: Names of runtime secrets the project requires. Each name must be a valid POSIX env-var name and must be registered in the orchestrator's secrets store before a job starts.

setup.description: Steps run before the agent starts. Short-circuits on first failure.

steps.description: Commands to run during setup. All must pass before health checks run.

health_checks.description: Verification checks to ensure readiness. Only run if all setup steps pass.

validation.description: Validation steps run after setup completes.

required.description: Steps that must pass. All steps run regardless of individual failures.

advisory.description: Optional validation steps. Failures do not affect overall pass/fail.

working_dir.description: Relative path where the command executes, resolved from the workspace root.

paths.description: Doublestar glob patterns for conditional execution (validation steps only). If set, the step only runs when changed files match at least one pattern.

timeout.description: Maximum execution time. Accepts an integer (seconds) or a Go duration string (e.g. "10m", "1h30m", "30s"). 0 or omitted means no timeout.

retry.description: Number of additional attempts if the step fails (setup steps only). 0 or omitted means no retries. Maximum 10.

cacheEntry.description: A single keyed cache entry for a guest path.

path.description: Guest path to cache. Absolute paths are used as-is; relative paths resolve under the workspace (/home/kvarn/workspace); paths starting with ~ expand to the kvarn user's home (/home/kvarn). The workspace root itself and anything under /nix are rejected.

lockfiles.description: Paths to lockfiles used to compute a content-addressed cache key (e.g. package-lock.json).

key.description: Fixed cache key string. The caller owns invalidation.

bucket.description: Cache bucket name used to group related entries.
